summary.intent: Add a failing test to expose a bug where Grok 3+ and Grok 4 models are not recognized as reasoning-capable, then fix the underlying detection logic.
summary.outcome: Added Grok model patterns to `supports_reasoning_for_model()` in model_capabilities.rs, wrote a test that confirmed the bug then passed after the fix, and committed the change with all 115 tests passing.

repo: Reasoning capability detection lives in `crates/providers/src/model_capabilities.rs` via `supports_reasoning_for_model()`
Model IDs are normalized for OpenRouter in `crates/providers/src/model_id.rs`
The project uses a 'beads' issue tracker alongside GitHub issues — bugs get filed there and claimed before work begins

code.finding: Existing reasoning test at line 527 — Grok model assertions were added here to create the failing test case
`supports_reasoning_for_model()` uses string patterns to match model IDs; it lacked any Grok/xai patterns prior to this fix

workflow: Test-first approach: write a failing test, confirm it fails, apply fix, confirm it passes
Ran format check (`cargo fmt --check`) before committing
Beads issue was created and closed within the same session to track the bug

friction: Multiple test invocation attempts were needed to correctly target the right test module/binary before finding the right command
